summary: Completed testing of Nova Studio vibe-coding chat with Supabase PostgreSQL backend (nidoai architecture). All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Verified: POST /api/run-agent creates row in Supabase agent_logs and returns logId, GET /api/agent-logs/{logId} reads from Supabase, agent worker writes status transitions (queued → processing → success), terminal history accumulates timestamped entries, frontend shows 'Agent Thinking...' badge, Agent Terminal displays live logs with color coding, input re-enables after agent finishes, agent response renders in chat.
passed_tests: POST /api/run-agent requires JWT auth (401 without token)
GET /api/agent-logs/{logId} requires JWT auth (401 without token)
POST /api/run-agent validates user_message is required (422 for empty)
POST /api/run-agent validates user_message field exists (422 for missing)
POST /api/run-agent creates row in Supabase agent_logs, returns {success: true, logId: uuid}
GET /api/agent-logs/{logId} reads from Supabase, returns execution log with correct schema
GET /api/agent-logs/{logId} returns 404 for unknown logId
Agent worker writes status transitions to Supabase (queued → processing → success/failed)
Terminal history accumulates timestamped entries in Supabase
POST /api/run-agent works with default system_prompt
Admin login works (admin@nova.ai / admin123)
CSDROP login works (admin@csdrop.com / nova_csdrop_2026)
GET /api/studio/workflows works (regression)
Frontend: Studio loads at /studio with Vibe Chat pane
Frontend: Sending message shows 'Agent Thinking...' badge
Frontend: Agent Terminal shows live logs from Supabase (via useAgentTerminal hook)
Frontend: Terminal shows color-coded logs (green=success, red=error, purple=processing, blue=init)
Frontend: Agent response renders in chat on completion
Frontend: Input re-enables after agent finishes
Frontend: Mode toggle works (Vibe/Node)
Frontend: Node Canvas appears in Node mode with visual nodes
Marketplace loads (regression)
CSDROP dashboard works (regression)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supabase integration fully tested. Key components: 1) POST /api/run-agent creates agent_logs row in Supabase PostgreSQL, fires BackgroundTask worker, returns {success, logId}, 2) GET /api/agent-logs/{logId} reads from Supabase, returns execution log with status, terminal_history, output_result, 3) useAgentTerminal hook subscribes to Supabase Realtime (postgres_changes UPDATE events) with 1.5s fallback polling, 4) Agent Terminal shows color-coded logs (blue=init, purple=processing, green=success, red=error), 5) Agent response appears in chat when execution completes. Supabase project: ojvygmrxphwmaelghoxb.supabase.co. Note: LLM calls may fail due to budget limits - this is expected and the execution FLOW works correctly regardless.

supabase_integration.realtime: Supabase Realtime enabled on agent_logs table

run_agent_endpoint.storage: Creates row in Supabase agent_logs table

agent_worker.terminal_history_updates: Appends timestamped log entries to Supabase during execution

frontend_useAgentTerminal_hook.realtime_subscription: Supabase postgres_changes UPDATE events filtered by log_id
